name: Agentic Trading Guardrail
problem: Autonomous trading agents may exceed risk limits.
story: Oversized tech position breaches sector concentration limit.

data_sources.name: SEC market risk guidelines
data_sources.note: Synthetic facts modeled on open patterns; no PII

data_sources.name: FINRA rule patterns
data_sources.note: Synthetic facts modeled on open patterns; no PII

rules: IF PositionSize(x, p) AND OverPositionLimit(p) THEN TradeBlocked(x)
IF SectorExposure(x, s) AND OverSectorLimit(s) THEN TradeBlocked(x)

default.label: Blocked — position limit
default.explanation: Trade blocked — position and sector limits exceeded.
